recommendations.title: The Butterfly
recommendations.overview: An old man who has one interest in life, collecting butterflies, has his life changed by an eight year old girl.

recommendations.title: The Selfish Giant
recommendations.overview: A hyperactive boy and his best friend, a slow-witted youth with an affinity for horses, start collecting scrap metal for a shady dealer.

recommendations.title: Battle of the Sexes
recommendations.overview: The true story of the 1973 tennis match between world number one Billie Jean King and ex-champ and serial hustler Bobby Riggs.

recommendations.title: Menace II Society
recommendations.overview: A young street hustler attempts to escape the rigors and temptations of the ghetto in a quest for a better life.

recommendations.title: Mysterious Skin
recommendations.overview: A teenage hustler and a young man obsessed with alien abductions cross paths, together discovering a horrible, liberating truth.

recommendations.title: Black Cat, White Cat
recommendations.overview: A small-time hustler makes a deal with a notorious gangster to whom he owes money: marry his teenage son to the latter's daughter. However, the young lovers are not as agreeable.

recommendations.title: Double Take
recommendations.overview: A man on the run takes another man's passport, only to find himself stuck with the identity of a street hustler.

recommendations.title: The Phantom Carriage
recommendations.overview: An alcoholic, abusive ne'er-do-well is shown the error of his ways through a legend that dooms the last person to die on New Year's Eve before the clock strikes twelve to take the reins of Death's chariot and work tirelessly collecting fresh souls fo

recommendations.title: Ride On
recommendations.overview: A washed-up stuntman and his stunt horse become an overnight social media sensation when their real-life fight with debt collectors goes viral.

recommendations.title: You Kill Me
recommendations.overview: While drying out on the West Coast, an alcoholic hit man befriends a tart-tongued woman who might just come in handy when it's time for him to return to Buffalo and settle some old scores.
